name: Extra Crusty Macaroni & Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Butter, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the macaroni in plenty of salted water until tender, 8 to 10 minutes. Drain and cool under cold running water.
2. Prepare the White Sauce, and while still hot, toss all but two tablespoons of it with the macaroni, mustard, cayenne, cheddar cheese, salt, and pepper.
3. Transfer into a large buttered casserole dish and top with the Munster cheese.
4. Bake in a preheated 375°F oven for 15 minutes, or until the top is crusty and brown.
5. Spread the remaining two tablespoons of White Sauce over the top.
6. Cover with a layer of Parmesan cheese mixed with breadcrumbs.
7. Dab with butter.
8. Return to the oven for another 10 minutes.
9. Place under high broiler for 1 minute to brown the top and serve immediately.
Makes 4 servings.
